trades.reasoning: Top score (95), RSI 64.4 is in the ideal bullish momentum zone — not overbought — with confirmed MACD crossover and rising histogram, offering the best risk/reward entry of the day.
Co-top score (95), RSI 66.6 is still below overbought territory, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — a clean momentum setup in a risk-on tape.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.3% and S&P 500 up 0.8%, creating a favorable tailwind for momentum plays. With 4 open slots and $630 in cash, I'm adding FLY and LUNR — both score 95 and sit in the ideal RSI 55–70 zone, unlike most other candidates which are deeply overbought (RSI 80–88) and carry mean-reversion risk. Existing positions in SMCI and NVDA continue to trend well and are held.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on May 8, 2026, with the NASDAQ leading gains at +1.3% as tech and growth stocks benefited from renewed risk appetite. The move was underpinned by easing macro uncertainty and continued strength in semiconductor and AI-adjacent names, which have been the engine of the bull run throughout 2026. Breadth was solid across sectors, suggesting institutional participation rather than a narrow speculative spike.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年5月8日，美國股市全面上揚，納斯達克指數領漲，升幅達1.3%，科技及成長股受惠於市場風險偏好回升而普遍走強。半導體及人工智能相關類股延續強勢，成為本輪牛市的核心動力。市場廣度表現理想，顯示機構資金積極參與，而非單純的投機性追捧。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast and how much a stock's price has moved. When RSI is between 55 and 70, the stock has strong upward momentum but isn't yet 'overbought' — meaning buyers are still in control without the market being stretched to a breaking point. Today FLY and LUNR were chosen specifically because their RSIs sit in this sweet spot, while dozens of other candidates with RSIs above 80 were skipped as they carry higher reversal risk.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）用來衡量股價升跌的速度與幅度。當RSI介於55至70之間，代表股票動能強勁但尚未進入「超買」區域，即買方力量仍主導市場，但走勢尚未過度拉伸至反轉臨界點。今日選擇FLY及LUNR，正是因為兩者RSI均處於此理想區間，而其他RSI高於80的候選股則因均值回歸風險較高而予以迴避。
